choices.text: ERC-721A (Azuki): mint 5 NFTs at ~1.5× gas vs. 5× for OpenZeppelin. Defers per-token storage until transfer. Standard for large mass-mint collections.
Merkle root: store single bytes32 on-chain; users submit proof + leaf. MerkleProof.verify(proof, root, hash(msg.sender)) gates mint. 10k addresses = 10k×32 bytes on-chain → 32 bytes total.

questions.explanation: Merkle root + proof = O(1) on-chain allowlist.
